name: Chicken Saltimbocca
recipeIngredient: 12 Chicken Breast Halves, Skinned And Boned
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip each chicken breast in flour.
2. Brown the chicken in butter.
3. Arrange the chicken in a buttered 13x9 inch baking pan.
4. Top each breast with 1 slice Prosciutto and 1 slice cheese.
5. Cook onions and garlic until soft.
6. Add mushrooms, white wine, broth, and herbs to the pan. Bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Stir in 1 tablespoon flour and a small amount of sherry.
9. Stir in the remaining sherry and cream.
10. Season with salt and pepper.
11. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
12. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes.
